tuv.seg: 交交黃鳥，止于棘。 誰從穆公？子車奄息。維此奄息，百夫之特。 臨其穴，惴惴其慄。 彼蒼者天，殲我良人！如可贖兮，人百其身。

They flit about, the yellow birds, And rest upon the jujube trees. Who followed duke Mû in the grave? Zze-kü Yen-hsî. And this Yen-hsî Was a man above a hundred. When he came to the ​grave, He looked terrified and trembled. Thou azure Heaven there! .mw-parser-output .__reconstruct_bracket{font-style:normal;font-weight:normal}⟨Thou art destroying our good men.⟩ Could he have been redeemed, We would have given a hundred (ordinary) men for him.
